exercises.name: Flat DB Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Flat DB Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: Focus on mind-muscle connection with pecs. Drop the weight back and focus on stretch and squeeze!

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, squeeze your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: 2-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Do first set wide overhand (1.5x shoulder width), second set underhand (1x shoulder width)

exercises.name: DB Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: Take medium strides, let your torso lean forward

exercises.name: DB Skull Crusher
exercises.notes: Arc the dumbbells behind your head, constant tension on triceps

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Raise the dumbbells "out" not "up", mind muscle connection with middle fibers

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Hack Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight back and focus on controlling the negative. Smooth and consistent rep tempo.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: Sink the dumbbells as low as you comfortably can

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Do seated if available. Otherwise do Lying Leg Curl or Nordic Ham Curl.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.notes: Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top, control the weight

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Round your back as you crunch.

exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.notes: Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top, control the weight

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Arc the bar "out" not "up", focus on squeezing your biceps

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Round your back as you crunch.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Weighted Dip (Back off)
exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: DB Step Up
exercises.notes: Use a box height that places your working leg's thigh at parallel when your other foot is on the ground

exercises.name: 2-Grip Pullup
exercises.notes: First set 1.5x shoulder width grip. Second set 1.0x shoulder width grip

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Lean away from the cable. Focus on squeezing your delts.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Lean slightly forward, lock your elbow behind your torso (shoulder hyperextension)

exercises.name: Leg Press Toe Press
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Incline Machine Press
exercises.notes: 45° incline, focus on squeezing your chest

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.notes: Initiate the movement by squeezing your shoulder blades together, pull to your lower chest, avoid using momentum

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Brace your chest against an incline bench, curl with your elbows slightly in front of you

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Emphasize the stretch in your hamstrings, prevent your lower back from rounding

exercises.notes: Tuck your elbows at 45°, lean your torso forward 15°, shoulder width or slightly wider grip

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: High and wide foot positioning, start with weaker leg

exercises.name: Pendlay Row

exercises.name: Glute-Ham Raise
exercises.notes: Keep your hips straight, do Nordic ham curls if no GHR machine

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Brace your chest against an incline bench, curl with your elbows slightly in front of you

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Knees to chest, controlled reps, straighten legs more to increase difficulty

exercises.name: Slight Incline DB Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle. Tuck your elbows slightly

exercises.name: Slight Incline DB Press (Back off)
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle. Tuck your elbows slightly

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Maintain a neutral lower back, set your hips back, don't allow your spine to round

exercises.name: Machine Pulldown
exercises.notes: Think about pulling your elbows "down" and "in". Last set only do a dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps.

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Start with your weaker leg. Squat deep

exercises.name: Triceps Pressdown
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 12-15 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 12-15 reps. Focus on squeezing your triceps to move the weight

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Focus on squeezing your lateral delt to move the weight

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way up to your toes, stretch your calves at the bottom, don't bounce

exercises.name: Machine Squat (Heavy)
exercises.notes: Focus on strength here. Each week add weight or reps. Keep form consistent.

exercises.name: Machine Squat (Back off)
exercises.notes: Drop the weight back and focus on controlling the negative. Smooth and consistent rep tempo.

exercises.name: Standing DB Arnold Press
exercises.notes: Start with your elbows in front of you and palms facing in. Rotate the dumbbells so that your palms face forward as you press.

exercises.name: Nordic Ham Curl
exercises.notes: Keep your hips as straight as you can, can sub for lying leg curl

exercises.name: Meadows Row
exercises.notes: Brace with your non-working hand against your knee, stay light, emphasize form

exercises.name: Inverse Zottman Curl
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Hammer curl on concentric, supinated curl (palms up) on the eccentric

exercises.name: Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Dropset: perform 10-12 reps, drop the weight by ~50%, perform an additional 10-12 reps. Focus on bringing your inner elbows together - not your hands

exercises.name: Slight Incline DB Press (Heavy)
exercises.notes: 15° bench angle. Tuck your elbows slightly

exercises.name: Slight Incline DB Press (Back off)
